# Platinum Plus Credit Card
Sourcing of this Credit Card has been stopped. Existing customers of this card will continue to enjoy the benefits.
![banner-logo](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankstagePWS/platinum-plus-credit-card-desktop-banner-1?fmt=webp-alpha)
[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/generic-mailer-tnc.pdf) to view the changes in HDFC Bank Platinum Plus Credit Cardeffective 15th May 2026.
What's in store for you?[](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/platinum-plus-credit-card#features "Benefits")

## Card Benefits and Features
### Reward Point Benefits
  * 4 Reward Points for every ₹ 200 spent


![Platinum Plus Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Milestone Benefits
  * On crossing spends of ₹50,000 every month, get 50% more Reward Points on every ₹ 200 spent.


![Platinum Plus Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * Up to 3 free Add-on Cards for your family
  * Get up to 50 days of interest-free Credit from the date of purchase.


![Platinum Plus Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### Card Management & Controls
  2. ### More Rewards with PayZapp
  3. ### ​Fees and Renewal
  4. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


#  Card Management & Controls 
  * **Single Interface**


One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans
  * **Spends tracking**


Simple interface to track all your spends
  * **Reward Points**


View and redeem points at the push of a button
![Card Management and Controls:](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  More Rewards with PayZapp 
  * Link your HDFC Bank Platinum Plus Credit Card on PayZapp


  * Earn Additional CashBack along with the card Reward Points on Utility Bills, Mobile Recharges and more.


  * Get ₹1,000 CashBack on Shopping in-app over 200 plus brands


  * Securely pay without the hassle of OTPs with ‘Swipe to Pay’ 


![More Rewards with PayZapp](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  ​Fees and Renewal 
  * An interest at the rate of 3.49% will be charged on any outstanding amount carried forward beyond the bill's due date.
  * A 2.5% fee with a minimum of ₹500 will be applicable on all cash withdrawals from the card.


![Fees and Charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/personal-mitc/mitc-in-english.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.


![Terms and Conditions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  What is a Platinum Plus Credit Card? 
**Platinum Plus Credit Card India** is a feature-rich Credit Card that offers exclusive benefits, rewards, and privileges to its cardholders. It provides a range of value-added services designed to enhance your lifestyle. 
###  What are the benefits of a Platinum Plus Credit Card?
The **Platinum Plus Credit Card online** offers various benefits including rewards on your spending, zero liability on lost cards, an interest-free credit period, convenient bill payment options, and robust security features.
###  Is the Platinum Plus Credit Card free? 
No, the **Platinum Plus Credit Card** is not free. It comes with an annual fee and applicable taxes. However, the benefits and rewards you receive outweigh the nominal fee.
###  How to use a Platinum Plus Credit Card? 
  * Unlock a world of convenience and rewards with your HDFC Bank **Plus Platinum Credit Card perks.**
  * Enjoy seamless transactions across millions of merchants worldwide.
  * Make contactless payments for quick and hassle-free transactions.


###  How to apply for a Platinum Plus Credit Card? 
We are currently not accepting new applications for the HDFC Bank Platinum Plus Credit Card.   
However, you can explore a range of other credit cards that may suit your needs. Click [here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards) to view our available options and find the right card for you.
